metadata.title: GlowReaJo | Korean Skincare in Jordan
metadata.description: Discover authentic Korean skincare products delivered to your doorstep in Jordan. Shop cleansers, serums, moisturizers, and more.
metadata.keywords: Korean skincare, K-beauty, Jordan, skincare products, serums, moisturizers
metadata.aboutDescription: GlowReaJo brings authentic Korean skincare to Jordan. Learn about our mission to make K-beauty accessible to everyone in Amman and across Jordan.
metadata.shopDescription: Browse our collection of authentic Korean skincare products in Jordan. Cleansers, serums, moisturizers, sunscreens & more from top K-beauty brands.
metadata.blogDescription: Read our latest skincare tips, K-beauty routines, product guides, and expert advice. Learn how to build the perfect Korean skincare routine.
metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with GlowReaJo. Questions about Korean skincare products, orders, or shipping in Jordan? Contact us — we're here to help.
metadata.faqDescription: Find answers to common questions about GlowReaJo's Korean skincare products, categories, shipping, and more.

footer.tagline: Your destination for authentic Korean skincare in Jordan.

hero.title: Glow with Korean Skincare
hero.subtitle: Discover premium Korean skincare products, carefully curated and delivered straight to your door in Jordan.

valueProps.authenticDesc: Every product is sourced directly from Korea, guaranteed genuine.
valueProps.codDesc: Pay when your order arrives at your doorstep. No online payment needed.
valueProps.deliveryDesc: Receive your order within 2-5 business days anywhere in Jordan.
valueProps.supportDesc: Get personalized skincare advice from our expert team via WhatsApp.

routine.cleanserDesc: Start with a gentle cleanser to remove impurities.
routine.tonerDesc: Balance your skin's pH and prep for the next steps.
